# Bundled PDF.js

PDF.js is bundled to avoid loading executable parser code from a third-party CDN at runtime.

- Version: 3.11.174
- Source: https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js
- License: Apache License 2.0

SHA-256:

```text
978fd1b2d134a98e98966186a97777bebf87d8e770dadab1ece3687e21a5aa6c  pdf.min.js
38cde5311957b86bc3669f93e7d2566de333a90055ed6635bef60d9bf00e96f2  pdf.worker.min.js
0d542e0c8804e39aa7f37eb00da5a762149dc682d7829451287e11b938e94594  LICENSE
```
